query: SELECT id, email, name, loginMethod, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'SET' END as hashStatus FROM users WHERE email NOT LIKE 'test-%' AND email NOT LIKE '%@example.com' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
